USDJPY|2026-07-14.macro_summary: US CPI at 18:00 IST and Fed Chairman Warsh Testifies at 19:30 IST are the key events. Higher than expected CPI prints and hawkish testimony would hurt this USDJPY short, while lower prints and dovish commentary would help. All events are scheduled for today.

Higher than expected CPI readings would hurt the short GOLD setup, while lower readings would help. Fed testimony that signals a hawkish stance would hurt, while a dovish tone would help.
